name: get
_note: Live boot reality: the personas.get reachable at runtime is the Z4 thin wrapper in server.js (reads input.id from STATE.customPersonas). With no actor-owned persona seeded it returns ok:false (missing_id / persona_not_found) — never no_db, never a throw. The full marketplace get (reviews + isAuthor) is in server/domains/personas.js but that module is currently UNWIRED (registerPersonasActions is never imported); wiring it makes get author/visibility-gated and adds result.reviews. See server/tests/personas-lens-macros.test.js for the intended shape.
